summary: A major emerging economy and manufacturing hub tightly linked to the US, navigating cartel violence, migration pressures, and rising 'nearshoring' investment.

history.detail: Revolt against Spanish rule; independence achieved 1821.
Lost roughly half its territory to the US by 1848.
Decade-long upheaval reshaping land and politics.
Free trade with US/Canada; indigenous revolt in Chiapas.

resources.oil_gas: State oil firm Pemex; declining output
resources.water: Stress in north and central regions
resources.agriculture: Avocados, corn, tomatoes — major US exporter

follow_the_money.detail: Over $60B/yr sent home from workers in the US
Factories relocating from Asia to Mexico
